caption:
How to Spend One Festive Day in Vienna 🎄✨with @jetpacglobal

Start at the Popp & Kretschmer🎀, visit the Gerstner Café and Hotel Sacher nearby. Then stop by DEMEL for a dessert and warm up with hot chocolate at Altwiener Christkindlmarkt☕️ Continue to Rathausplatz to see the magical heart💖Finish your walk under the famous lights on the Graben🌟

Jetpac helped me explore Vienna with no stress 📱✈️ by saving 80% compared with my roaming plan and providing free access to Uber and Google Maps, which made getting around much quicker. I was also able to contact my hotel directly using the in-app voice calling feature.

🎁Thanks to the Jetpac Giveaway you can win a $500 eSIM! (Until 31st December)

Comment “No Roaming” and I’ll send you the offer link 💬

transcription.text: How to spend one festive day in Vienna? Start at the iconic Red Bull installation. Visit the Gürzler Café and Hotel Zahar nearby. Stop by Demel for a traditional dessert and warm up with a hot chocolate at the local market. Continue to Rathausplatz to see the magical flying heart. Finish your walk under the famous chandelier lights. Jetpack helped me to explore Vienna with no stress by saving 80% compared with my roaming plan and providing free access to Uber and Google Maps which made getting around much quicker. I was also able to contact my hotel directly using the in-app voice calling feature. Thanks to the jetpack giveaway you can win a $500 eSIM. Comment NoRoaming and I will send you the offer link.
